---
name: 📋 Task
about: Create a task for development work
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Description

A clear description of the task to be completed and the context behind it.

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] Tests are written and passing
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Code review approved

---

## 🔧 Technical Notes

Include any relevant technical details, design decisions, APIs to use, or constraints that the implementer should be aware of.

---

## ⏱️ Estimated Effort

- [ ] XS — Less than 2 hours
- [ ] S — Half a day
- [ ] M — 1–2 days
- [ ] L — 3–5 days
- [ ] XL — More than a week (consider breaking down)

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

- Closes #
- Depends on #
- Blocked by #
